title: Bed Item Icons
description: Changes the bed item model to display a 2d bed icon in the GUI only.
body:
Simple resource to replace the bed item visual with a 2d icon in the GUI whilst keeping the original 3d visual everywhere else using the new 24w45a item state models system.

Base pack/bed icon textures credit:
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

Discord: https://discord.gg/C8KKgbA8jy

![A visual example of what the pack does in 24w45a+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09270e0d96c439a7d41cc7a9dc12bde17a32fc05.png)
